mapper.select: SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM resource_download_log WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT r.title, COUNT(d.id) AS download_count FROM resource_download_log d LEFT JOIN teaching_resource r ON d.resource_id = r.id GROUP BY r.title ORDER BY download_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
